title: ZTAP Alert
content:
This playbok is triggered by fetching escalated ZTAP Alerts.
The playbook fetches newly escalated alerts.
Then, the playbook performs enrichment on the incident's indicators.
Lastly, it adds comments/logs as Evidence.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Critical Start pack (ZeroTrustAnalyticsPlatform, partner-supported).

Inputs — Enrich: Determines whether to enrich all indicators in the incident.; OnCall: Set to true to assign only user that is currently on shift. Requires Cortex XSOAR v5.5 or later..

Integrations/scripts used: AssignAnalystToIncident, IsIntegrationAvailable, ZeroTrustAnalyticsPlatform.

  Then, the playbook performs enrichment on the incident's indicators.
  Lastly, it adds comments/logs as Evidence.

          right:
